course_title: APPLIED SECURITY ANALYSIS AND INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT I
description: The management of an actual portfolio of investments. Engage in security analysis, develop a portfolio policy, and participate in field research such as trips to interview the management of potential portfolio acquisitions.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Finance, Investment and Banking: Applied Security Analysis graduate program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Finance, Investment and Banking: Applied Security Analysis graduate program
